summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. FBI警告加密代幣假冒機構在Tron網絡上出現，投資者需提高警覺。
2. Gemini股價在盤後交易中上漲，顯示市場對其業務轉型的支持。
3. SEC的加密法律解釋被認為是進一步討論的開始，對行業影響深遠。
4. 加密市場總市值達到2.50兆美元，BTC市佔率為56.47%。
5. Bybit推出收益型代幣化黃金，以擴展真實世界資產收益市場。

## 📊 市場概況
今日加密市場整體表現略顯疲軟，主流幣種普遍下跌。比特幣（BTC）目前價格為$70,401，24小時內下跌約0.85%；以太坊（ETH）則報價$2,149.02，下跌約1.90%。雖然主要幣種價格回落，但市場總市值仍保持在2.50兆美元，顯示出投資者對市場的長期信心。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
從技術指標來看，比特幣和以太坊的相對強弱指數（RSI）分別為51.3和54.1，顯示出市場整體仍處於中性範圍。均線訊號顯示多頭趨勢，這表明短期內多頭力量仍在，可能會吸引更多買盤進入市場。然而，投資者應密切關注價格走勢及市場動態，以防止突發事件影響市場情緒。

## 😱 市場情緒
目前的恐懼貪婪指數為23，顯示市場處於極度恐懼的狀態。這可能會影響投資者的決策，導致賣壓增加。然而，長期投資者可能會視此為進場的機會。社群情緒普遍較為謹慎，建議投資者在交易時謹慎考量風險。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
隨著假冒代幣事件的增多，投資者需提高警惕，確保所投資的資產來源正確且安全。此外，近期市場波動性加大，投資者應注意自身風險承受能力，避免因恐慌情緒而做出不理性的決策。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
投資者應關注SEC對加密法律的進一步解釋，以及Gemini的業務轉型進展。特別是FBI對假冒機構的警告，可能會對短期市場情緒造成影響。除此之外，Bybit推出的收益型代幣化黃金是否能引起市場的廣泛關注，亦是值得觀察的焦點。

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
news.title_zh: 今天加密貨幣發生了什麼

news.title: SEC interpretation on crypto laws ‘a beginning, not an end,‘ says Atkins
news.summary: The SEC chair signaled that the agency would defer to a market structure bill if passed by Congress, but needed a ”bridge” to clarify crypto regulation.

news.summary_zh: SEC官員Atkins強調對加密法律的解釋只是新的起點，未來仍有許多討論空間。

news.summary_zh: BPI警告肯塔基州的加密法案可能存在安全漏洞，影響硬體錢包的安全性。

news.summary: Bitcoin bull market optimism has suffered since the October crash, as chances of an extended BTC price drop below $55,000 increase.

news.title: Crypto for Advisors: Bitcoin’s price discovery

news.summary_zh: 探討比特幣的價格發現過程及其對投資顧問的影響。

news.title: Forward Industries buys back $27 million in stock using Galaxy loan as SOL treasury faces drawdown
news.summary: The structure has Forward industries leaning on short-term, low-cost debt to amplify exposure to SOL per share.

news.summary_zh: Forward Industries通過Galaxy貸款回購股票，應對SOL財庫資金減少的挑戰。

news.title: MLB taps Polymarket as exclusive partner, teams with CFTC on betting integrity after last year’s scandal
news.summary: The prediction market and MLB will exclusively work together "to restrict markets that present an integrity risk."
news.title_zh: 美國職棒大聯盟選擇Polymarket作為獨家合作夥伴，與CFTC合作確保投注誠信，因應去年的醜聞
news.summary_zh: 美國職棒大聯盟與Polymarket及CFTC合作，強化投注誠信，防範過去的醜聞重演。

news.title: ECB seeks experts to help integrate digital euro into ATMs, card payment terminals

news.summary_zh: 歐洲央行正在尋找專家，以便將數位歐元有效整合到現有的支付系統中。

news.title: Europe’s largest asset manager Amundi debuts $100 million tokenized fund on Ethereum, Stellar

news.title: Bitcoin $20,000 put option is third most popular strike ahead of quarterly expiry
news.title_zh: 比特幣2萬美元的賣權選擇權在季度到期前成為第三熱門行使價
news.summary_zh: 隨著季度到期臨近，比特幣的2萬美元賣權選擇權成為市場上第三受歡迎的選擇。

news.title: Major League Baseball signs prediction markets pacts with CFTC, Polymarket
news.title_zh: 美國職棒大聯盟與CFTC及Polymarket簽署預測市場協議
news.summary_zh: 美國職棒大聯盟與CFTC及Polymarket達成協議，進一步推動預測市場的發展。

news.title: Coinbase Commerce page requests seed phrases, raising security concerns
news.summary: A Coinbase subdomain linked to its Commerce tool reportedly directed users to a withdrawal page asking to enter their seed phrases, raising concerns
news.title_zh: Coinbase Commerce頁面要求種子短語，引發安全疑慮
news.summary_zh: Coinbase Commerce的要求引發用戶對安全性的擔憂，特別是對種子短語的請求。

news.title: Vivek Ramaswamy’s Strive adds 317 BTC, enters top 10 public treasury holders as Q4 results show bitcoin-driven losses
news.summary: The firm reported a $393.6 million net loss in Q4, largely driven by declines in the fair value of its bitcoin holdings.
news.title_zh: Vivek Ramaswamy的Strive增持317 BTC，進入前10大公開財庫持有者，第四季結果顯示比特幣驅動的損失
news.summary_zh: Strive在第四季顯示比特幣損失後，增持317 BTC，成功跻身前10大公開財庫持有者行列。

news.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) drops 3.3%, leading index lower
news.title_zh: CoinDesk 20表現更新：NEAR Protocol (NEAR)下跌3.3%，引領指數走低
news.summary_zh: NEAR Protocol的表現不佳，導致CoinDesk 20指數下滑，顯示市場波動性。

news.title: Zenith links Canton and Ethereum through atomic swaps

news.title: OP_NET launches Bitcoin DeFi push without bridges or wrapped BTC

news.title: Hacked crypto tokens drop 61% on average and rarely recover, Immunefi report says
news.summary: Beyond immediate losses, attacks often lead to prolonged downtime, liquidity shocks and confidence erosion, as interconnected DeFi systems
news.title_zh: 駭客攻擊的加密貨幣代幣平均下跌61%，且很少恢復，Immunefi報告指出
news.summary_zh: 根據Immunefi的報告，駭客攻擊導致的加密貨幣代幣平均損失達61%，且恢復的機會極低。

news.title: Apex Group’s Tokeny taps Polygon to debut chain for compliant tokenized RWAs
news.summary: Apex Group’s Tokeny and Polygon Labs are launching T-REX Ledger, a Polygon-based blockchain that aims to centralize compliance for ERC-3643 secu
news.title_zh: Apex Group的Tokeny與Polygon合作推出合規代幣化實體資產的新鏈
news.summary_zh: Apex Group旗下的Tokeny與Polygon合作，推出一個專為合規代幣化實體資產設計的新鏈。

news.title: Apex Group unit Tokeny taps Polygon for its interoperable tokenization platform T-REX Ledger
news.summary: The Polygon-based T-REX Ledger will serve as the official reference chain for permissioned ERC-3643 tokens.

news.title: Crypto hacks average $25 million as largest exploits skew industry losses: Immunefi

news.title_zh: 加密貨幣駭客攻擊平均損失2500萬美元，最大事件影響行業損失：Immunefi

news.title: Crypto.com Slashes Workforce by 12% in 'Enterprise-Wide AI' Pivot

news.title_zh: Crypto.com在推動“全企業AI”轉型中裁減12%員工
news.summary_zh: Crypto.com宣布裁減12%員工，以加速其向人工智慧的轉型。

news.title: XRP treasury firm Evernorth discloses $233.7 million impairment on holdings in SPAC filing

news.title: Crypto.com cuts 12% of staff as it accelerates AI push

news.title_zh: Crypto.com在加速AI推進中裁減12%員工
news.summary_zh: Crypto.com再次確認裁減12%員工，以推進其人工智慧的發展計劃。

news.title: Bitcoin tests old 2021 top as gold falls to six-week lows under $4.7K

news.title: The era of listings and on-ramps is ending, as intent protocols make access native

news.summary_zh: 隨著意圖協議的興起，傳統的上市和進入方式正逐漸被淘汰。

news.title: Morning Minute: Markets Tumble as Iran War Escalates

news.summary: US Bitcoin and altcoin ETFs saw notable outflows on Wednesday as BTC dipped below $71,000 and investor sentiment returned to extreme fear.

news.summary_zh: Animoca Brands的投資將助力Avalanche在亞洲和中東市場的擴張。

news.title: Coinbase faces a multibillion-dollar threat from D.C. but a 'rewards' loophole could protect its stablecoin revenue

news.summary: Authorities seized almost 40 BTC as part of the investigation, in which a rideshare driver is accused of wire fraud and money laundering.

news.title_zh: Crypto.com裁員12%，以提高業務效率並整合AI

news.summary: Adopting the model would require miners and users to migrate to a separate “Bitcoin Quantum” blockchain rather than upgrade the existing network.

news.title: Capital is shifting into digital dollars as bitcoin wilts
news.title_zh: 資金轉向數字美元，比特幣表現疲軟

news.title: Venus’ XVS token plunges 9% as exploit leaves protocol with bad debt
news.title_zh: Venus的XVS代幣下跌9%，協議因漏洞留下壞賬

news.title: Crypto.com cuts around 12% of staff as CEO pushes enterprise-wide AI integration
news.summary: Crypto.com cut 12% of its staff, or about 180 roles based on a prior headcount, as CEO Kris Marszalek pointed to an AI integration shift.
news.title_zh: Crypto.com裁員約12%，CEO推動全企業AI整合
news.summary_zh: Crypto.com在裁員的同時，CEO強調了AI整合的重要性以提升公司運營。

news.title: Bitcoin slips below $70,000 as oil surge, Fed pause weigh on risk assets
news.title_zh: 比特幣跌破70,000美元，油價上漲和美聯儲暫停影響風險資產
news.summary_zh: 比特幣因油價上漲和美聯儲政策影響，價格跌破70,000美元。

news.title: Bitcoin’s quantum threat is real, but far from an existential crisis, Galaxy says
news.title_zh: Galaxy表示，比特幣的量子威脅是真實的，但遠未構成生存危機
news.summary_zh: 雖然量子計算對比特幣構成威脅，但目前尚未達到生存危機的程度。

news.title: Bitcoin, unusually, outperforms gold as hawkish Fed, oil price fuel risk-off sentiment
news.title_zh: 比特幣異常地超越黃金，因美聯儲鷹派和油價推動風險避險情緒
news.summary_zh: 在市場避險情緒上升的背景下，比特幣的表現超過了傳統的避險資產黃金。

news.title: Why Ethereum developers want ‘one-click staking’ for institutions
news.summary: Ethereum developers are pushing one-click staking to simplify validator operations, attract institutions and strengthen decentralization across the network
news.title_zh: 以太坊開發者為何希望機構能實現「一鍵質押」
news.summary_zh: 以太坊開發者希望透過簡化質押流程，吸引更多機構參與以太坊生態系統。

news.title: ECB opens digital euro work on ATMs and payment terminals
news.summary: The initiative targets how a digital euro would operate across existing payment rails, with emphasis on offline transactions and interoperability.
news.title_zh: 歐洲央行啟動數位歐元在自動提款機和支付終端的應用工作
news.summary_zh: 歐洲央行開始探索數位歐元在自動提款機及支付終端的實際應用。

news.title: Bitcoin wobbles around $70,000 as macro headwinds weigh on crypto
news.summary: Bitcoin fell 5.5% to around $70,000 on Thursday afternoon in Asia, tracking a broader risk-off move across global markets.
news.title_zh: 比特幣在70,000美元附近震盪，宏觀因素影響加密貨幣市場
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格受宏觀經濟因素影響，在70,000美元附近波動不定。

news.title: South Korean lawmakers push to abolish upcoming 22% crypto tax
news.summary: They argue that crypto investors would be treated unfairly, citing an earlier repeal of the tax on gains from traditional financial products.
news.title_zh: 韓國立法者推動廢除即將實施的22%加密貨幣稅
news.summary_zh: 韓國立法者希望取消即將實施的高額加密貨幣稅，以促進市場發展。

news.title: OpenClaw devs targeted by phishing scam promising free ‘CLAW’ tokens
news.summary: A phishing campaign used fake GitHub posts and a bogus “CLAW” token to lure OpenClaw developers into connecting crypto wallets.

news.title: Nasdaq Wins SEC Approval to Trade Tokenized Securities in Pilot Program
news.summary: The approval lets Nasdaq test tokenized versions of some stocks and ETFs without moving beyond existing market rails.

news.title: OpenClaw Developers Lured in GitHub Phishing Campaign Targeting Crypto Wallets
news.summary: The phishing campaign lures OpenClaw developers with fake $5,000 token airdrops, then drains wallets through a cloned site with a hidden connection prompt.
news.title_zh: OpenClaw開發者在GitHub釣魚活動中受騙，目標為加密錢包
news.summary_zh: OpenClaw的開發者在GitHub上遭遇釣魚攻擊，該攻擊專門針對加密錢包。

news.title: Why Bitcoin Is Falling Despite $1.1 Billion in ETF Inflows
news.summary: Persistent inflation signals and surging oil prices are weighing on risk appetite, even as institutional money has continued to flow.
news.title_zh: 比特幣儘管有11億美元ETF資金流入，仍然下跌
news.summary_zh: 儘管ETF資金流入達11億美元，比特幣價格仍然下跌，反映市場情緒不佳。

news.title: Coalition Urges OpenAI to Scrap AI Ballot Measure Over Child Safety Concerns
news.summary: Advocacy groups say the OpenAI-backed measure would limit legal accountability and lock in narrow protections for children.
news.title_zh: 聯盟呼籲OpenAI撤回AI投票措施以保障兒童安全
news.summary_zh: 一個聯盟要求OpenAI取消AI相關的投票措施，因擔心對兒童安全的影響。
